errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.retryHint: Try again or reload the page.

workers.title: Workers
workers.emptyDescription: Background jobs (cron) are registered server-side. Once enabled they show up here.

skills.title: Skills
skills.emptyDescription: Add SKILL.md files under .claude/skills or install a plugin that ships skills.

promptBundles.title: Prompt-Bundle Cache
promptBundles.explanation: Each row is a stable working directory + Claude session for a unique (system-prompt, tools, model) combination. Reusing them keeps Anthropic's server-side prompt cache warm.
promptBundles.emptyDescription: Invoke a skill or send a chat message to populate the cache.

insights.title: Insights
insights.priorsEmpty: No priors yet — they accrue once Thompson sampling has run.

goap.title: GOAP Planner
goap.subtitle: Goal-oriented action planning. Define start state, goal predicates, and available actions; the planner returns a sequence of actions.
goap.noResult: Submit a problem to see the plan.

agents.title: Agents
agents.subtitleLead: The built-in dev team is always here for chat. Add your own agents for one-off specialties or project-specific personas.

sections.builtinSub_one: {{count}} seed agent · always available in chat
sections.builtinSub_other: {{count}} seed agents · always available in chat
sections.yourSubEmpty: Build a custom persona for one-off tasks

deleteConfirm.title: Delete {{name}}?
deleteConfirm.usedOn_one: This agent is used on {{count}} team. Deleting will unlink it — the team's role keeps its inline config.
deleteConfirm.usedOn_other: This agent is used on {{count}} teams. Deleting will unlink it — the team's role keeps its inline config.
deleteConfirm.unused: This agent is not used on any team. Chat threads will be removed.

agents.emptyDescription: Create your first agent to start building teams.

newProject.title: New Project
newProject.description: Create a project to start configuring a team and plan.

fields.name: Name
fields.goalPlaceholder: What should the agents accomplish? Be specific about the deliverable, the verification command, and any constraints.
fields.goalPlaceholderTemplate: Describe what you want to build. The {{template}} template's suggested goals will guide you.

teamBuilder.title: Team Builder
teamBuilder.selectProject: Select a project to configure its team.
teamBuilder.subtitle: Configure the agents for {{name}}.

saveAsTemplateDialog.title: Save team as template
saveAsTemplateDialog.description: Stores this team configuration to disk under your data dir. You can pick it from the New Project dialog later.
saveAsTemplateDialog.name: Name (≥2 chars)
saveAsTemplateDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: What this team is good for…

generateTitle.noTeamUnsaved: Configure roles and save the team first
generateTitle.saveFirst: Save the team first to generate a plan
generateTitle.unsaved: Unsaved changes — save first to generate a plan
generateTitle.noGoal: Set a goal on the project first
generateTitle.ready: Generate a plan from the saved team and goal

fields.toolsHint: Restrict what this agent can call. Leave empty to grant Claude Code defaults.

planEditor.title: Plan Editor
planEditor.selectProject: Select a project to view its plan.
planEditor.noPlanHint: Generate a plan from this project's team and goal.

node.noDeps: No other nodes to depend on.
node.instruction1: Click a node in the graph to edit it here.
node.instruction2: Drag nodes to rearrange the layout.

lockDialog.title: Lock & Run this plan?
lockDialog.titleHasUnsaved: Save unsaved changes and Lock & Run?
lockDialog.description: Locking prevents further edits and immediately starts a run with the current plan. The architect, developer, and QA agents will spawn against your repo. You can pause or cancel from the run view.
lockDialog.runDescription: Starts a run from the locked plan immediately. Tasks dispatch into git worktrees and begin executing. You can pause or cancel from the run view.

regenDialog.title: Regenerate plan?
regenDialog.description: This replaces the current draft with a freshly generated plan from the team and goal.

runView.title: Run View
runView.loadFailedDesc: The server returned an error or the run id is invalid.
runView.notFoundDesc: This run does not exist or has been deleted.
runView.loadFailedBody: The dashboard server returned an error while fetching this run. The run may still be running on the backend — try retrying.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel run?
cancelDialog.description: This stops the walker and marks the run as cancelled. In-flight subprocesses may take a moment to terminate.

toasts.budgetWarningDesc: Approaching the configured budget for this run.

firstRunModal.title: Agent Harness uses your Claude subscription
firstRunModal.description: This tool spawns claude -p subprocesses inheriting your ~/.claude/ credentials. Long-running runs consume your subscription quota. Review the Anthropic ToS — running intensive headless workflows is your responsibility.
firstRunModal.footnote: You will see this once. Acknowledgment is stored in browser localStorage.

testPrompt.title: Test prompt — {{role}}
testPrompt.description: Sends the system prompt + a sample goal to claude -p with --max-turns 2. Subscription quota applies.
testPrompt.loginHint: Hint: run `claude login` on the server host first.

templatePicker.noTemplateHint: Start with the default 3-role team and write your own goal.

home.title: Mission Control
home.subtitle: Live overview of all agent runs across your projects.

live.title: Live now
live.empty: No active runs — kick one off from a project.

byProject.title: By project
byProject.empty: No projects yet — create one from the sidebar.

recentRuns.title: Recent runs
recentRuns.subtitle: all projects · sortable
recentRuns.empty: No runs yet — create a project, generate a plan, lock & run.

projectDetail.subtitle: Project overview, team, plan, and run history.

runs.title: Run history
runs.empty: No runs yet — generate a plan and lock it to start the first one.

goalEdit.placeholder: Describe what the agents should accomplish.
goalEdit.hint: Re-generate the plan after saving to use the new goal in future runs.

applyTemplate.title: Apply a template
applyTemplate.description: Replaces the current draft team with the template.
applyTemplate.loads: Loads the chosen template into the current TeamBuilder draft.
applyTemplate.willOverwrite: Your current draft will be overwritten.

teamJsonDialog.title: Team configuration (JSON)
teamJsonDialog.description: What gets sent to PUT /api/projects/:id/team. Useful for sharing a config or moving it between machines.

costPanel.title: Cost / quota estimate
costPanel.description: Subscription mode doesn't bill per-token; this is a relative-weight readout plus an empirical projection from this project's prior runs.
costPanel.noData: No prior successful runs in this project — projection unavailable until you ship at least one run.

chat.notSeeded: Team chat is not seeded yet.
chat.notSeededBody: The built-in dev team (Marcus + 9 specialists) is installed automatically on first server boot. Restart the dashboard server, then return here.

thread.deleteConfirm: Delete this conversation? This cannot be undone.

composer.placeholder: Message Marcus + team — ⌘⏎ to send. Type @ to mention a teammate.

participants.title: People
participants.permanent: Marcus stays in every conversation. Add specialists to bring them into the chat — or @mention them inline.

addMember.title: Add to conversation
addMember.emptyCustom: No custom agents yet. Create one in Agents settings.

greeter.title: Brainstorm with the team
greeter.body: Marcus (Project Manager) chairs every conversation. He can pull specialists in, then create + start a project once you've agreed on direction.
greeter.starterGreeting: Hi! Tell me what you're thinking about — a feature idea, a bug to chase, or a fresh project. I'll loop in the specialists you need.
greeter.tip: Tip: type @Lena to address the frontend lead directly.

action.projectTeam: Team of {{count}}. Ready to plan & run.
action.noPlan: Cannot start run yet — no plan. Open the project to generate one.

agentChat.noAgentsBody: Create your first agent to start chatting.
agentChat.noThreads: no threads — type below to start one.
agentChat.startConversation: Type a message below to start the conversation.

avatarPicker.title: Choose a profile picture
avatarPicker.footer: Pick a picture or use an initials fallback. The same picture can be reused across agents.

tooltips.addMember: Add a specialist to this thread
tooltips.autopilotEnable: Enable autopilot — resume paused runs automatically
tooltips.cancelRun: Cancel and clean up the run
tooltips.lockAndRun: Lock the plan and start a run
tooltips.regeneratePlan: Re-generate the plan from current team + goal
tooltips.saveAsTemplate: Save current team as a reusable template
tooltips.resetBundle: Reset cached bundle (next call will re-warm)
